TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Margrethe_II, title = Margrethe_II, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Margrethe_II} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Margrethe II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) Margrethe II mrhuw Denmark ta' misuw hya' ga Margrethe II, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1972 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Margrethe II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) Margrethe II mrhuw Denmark ta' misuw hya' ga Margrethe II, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1972 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, marɣretħe ii, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) marɣretħe ii mrħuw *enmark taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa marɣretħe ii, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
